name: play_music
description: Plays a specific song, album, artist, or playlist on the user's connected music streaming service.

track.description: Name of the song or track to play.

artist.description: Name of the artist or band.

album.description: Name of the album to play.

playlist.description: Name or ID of a playlist to start.

service.description: Music streaming service to use. Defaults to the user's configured service.

shuffle.description: Whether to play in shuffle mode. Defaults to false.

volume.description: Playback volume (0–100). Omit to keep the current volume.
